zh: 搭配 REVO 碳纤维前节，极致低偏转
Uni-Loc 快拆接牙，拆装秒完成
多种珍贵木材可选，外观大气
en: 12-piece precision spliced butt with exquisite craftsmanship
Paired with REVO carbon fiber shaft for ultra-low deflection
Uni-Loc quick-release joint for instant assembly
Multiple exotic wood options with stunning aesthetics

suitable_for.zh: 中高级竞技玩家，追求极致控球精度和稳定发力的选手。适合经常参加比赛、对装备有高要求的球手。
suitable_for.en: Intermediate to advanced competitive players seeking maximum cue ball control and consistent power. Ideal for tournament players with high equipment standards.

review.zh: Ikon 系列是 Predator 的旗舰竞技产品线，代表了品牌在设计和工艺上的最高水平。12片拼接的后把不仅带来惊艳的视觉效果，更确保了重量分布的均匀和击球时的稳定性。搭配 REVO 前节使用时，整杆的偏转几乎可以忽略不计，让你可以专注于瞄准而不需要额外补偿。价格虽然不低，但作为一根可以用十年以上的竞技利器，性价比其实很高。
review.en: The Ikon series represents Predator's flagship competition line, showcasing the brand's highest standards in design and craftsmanship. The 12-piece spliced butt delivers not only stunning visual appeal but also ensures balanced weight distribution and stability during shots. When paired with the REVO shaft, deflection becomes virtually negligible, allowing you to focus purely on aiming without compensation. While the price point is premium, as a competition tool that can last over a decade, the value proposition is actually excellent.
